subject: Add XML content support : Get delta between anchor and payload
commit_message:
Add XML content support : Get delta between anchor and payload

- Add deltaReportSampleXml Example in component.yaml
- Add responseFormat in cpsDataV2.yml to support application/xml in Delta
- Add responseFormat parameter to accept xml in DeltaRestController.java
- Implemented Logic to convert deltaReport to XML in XmlObjectMapper.java

Issue-ID: CPS-3192
Change-Id: Iff7fab66ddcc03703255123c6d5c2eade0e7cb2a
Signed-off-by: GM001016278 <gourav.malviya@techmahindra.com>
